promotions.headline: 25% off sitewide
promotions.full_detail: Southern Aminos is offering 25% off sitewide. The sale is stackable with code SAMMYC. Confirm the final discount and checkout terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: $75+ giveaway, 3 winners
promotions.short_detail: June 8 to 12, each winner gets $300 store credit and a white 10-slot vial case
promotions.full_detail: Orders of $75 or more placed from June 8 through June 12 are automatically entered into a drawing. There will be three winners. Each winner will receive $300 in Southern Aminos store credit and one white 10-slot vial case. Confirm official giveaway terms directly with Southern Aminos.

promotions.headline: $75+ giveaway, 3 winners
promotions.short_detail: June 15 to 19, each winner gets $300 store credit and a white 10-slot vial case
promotions.full_detail: Orders of $75 or more placed from June 15 through June 19 are automatically entered into a drawing. There will be three winners. Each winner will receive $300 in Southern Aminos store credit and one white 10-slot vial case. Confirm official giveaway terms directly with Southern Aminos.

promotions.headline: Father's Day sale — SAMMYC boosted to 20% off
promotions.full_detail: Mile High Compounds is running a Father's Day sale. Code SAMMYC is temporarily boosted to 20% off through June 19. The comparison table reflects the boosted SAMMYC rate while this promotion is active.

promotions.headline: 15% off with SAVE15
promotions.full_detail: Use code SAVE15 for 15% off at Instant Peptides. The promotion is stackable with code SAMMYC. Confirm the final discount and checkout terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 15% off select research groups
promotions.short_detail: GLPs, copper peptides, MT-1 and MT-2, stackable with SAMMYC
promotions.full_detail: LabSourced Peptides is offering 15% off GLP products, the copper peptide group, MT-1, and MT-2. The promotion is stackable with the standard SAMMYC discount. Confirm eligible products and final checkout pricing directly with LabSourced Peptides.

promotions.headline: 20% off first order
promotions.full_detail: New customers receive 20% off their first order. The first-order offer is stackable with the 10% SAMMYC discount. Confirm eligibility and final checkout pricing directly with Solyn Compounds.

promotions.headline: 10% off sitewide + stackable SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Pay with Zelle for another stackable 10% off, June 12 to 19
promotions.full_detail: Glacier Aminos is offering 10% off sitewide from June 12 through June 19. Code SAMMYC adds another stackable 10% off. Paying with Zelle adds another stackable 10% off. Confirm final pricing and payment terms directly with Glacier Aminos.

promotions.headline: 30% off sitewide + pack savings
promotions.short_detail: Stackable with SAMMYC — 3/5/10/20 packs get extra 5/10/15/20% off
promotions.full_detail: Flawless Compounds is offering 30% off sitewide, stackable with code SAMMYC. Buying packs adds even more: 3-pack gets an extra 5% off, 5-pack 10% off, 10-pack 15% off, and 20-pack 20% off — all stackable. Confirm final pricing and eligible products directly with Flawless Compounds.
